outlook.summary: Extreme bearish positioning with PCR ratios 1.68-4.09 across expirations. Massive put walls at 630-640-650 create structural support. Spot at 649.94 sits on critical RESONANCE level. Smirk skew (1.54-1.80) confirms fear. Max Pain 653 acts as upside magnet. Break of 640 triggers dealer selling cascade.

levels.motivazione: Triple expiry RESONANCE: 0DTE 54,687 + Weekly 129,134 + Monthly 131,975 PUT OI. Ultimate structural floor. Dealer gamma hedging zone.
Triple expiry RESONANCE: 0DTE 60,374 + Weekly 23,094 + Monthly 100,416 PUT OI. Near spot support with heavy volume (39,171 vol 0DTE).
Triple expiry RESONANCE at spot: 0DTE 46,827 + Weekly 15,266 + Monthly 76,283 PUT OI. Critical inflection with 26,181 CALL volume.
0DTE Max Pain level 0.5% above spot. MM target zone. Combined with Weekly 656 and Monthly 665 creates upward attraction path.

CONFLUENCE 0DTE+Weekly: CALL OI 27,487 + 18,099. Weekly shows 20,124 PUT OI at same strike creating friction zone.
CONFLUENCE 0DTE+Monthly: 41,588 + 116,955 PUT OI. Secondary structural support below 630. High vol (2,213) indicates active hedging.
CONFLUENCE Weekly+Monthly: 7,136 + 19,051 CALL OI. Upper resistance extension with 18,051 Monthly OI.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility expected: negative GEX regime (-0.83B combined) amplifies price movements. Bearish smirk skew (1.85-2.02 ratio) indicates persistent put demand.
outlook.summary: Market trapped below key 580 confluence zone with dealers short gamma. High put activity (PCR 1.73 vol) suggests panic hedging. Max Pain at 581 creates magnetic pull. Watch 570 for structural break - below this triggers dealer selling cascade.

levels.motivazione: Critical inflection: Put wall in 0DTE (23.8K OI) + Weekly (6.5K OI) + Monthly (32K OI). Spot testing this level now. High volume 0DTE CALL 580 (13K vol) suggests hedging. Max Pain magnet 581 within 0.2%.

levels.motivazione: Strong resistance: Weekly Call Wall (5.6K) + Monthly Call Wall (20.7K) + Monthly Max Pain alignment. Total 26K+ Call OI creates dealer selling pressure on approach.
Dominant call wall: 0DTE (41.8K OI) + Weekly (6.2K) + Monthly (37K). Total 85K+ Call OI. Major ceiling, dealers hedge by selling rallies.
Monster monthly put wall (40.3K OI) + extreme 0DTE volume (34.6K vol, 2.1x OI). Unusual activity spike. Key structural support - break triggers dealer selling acceleration.
Significant 0DTE put wall (19.7K OI) with extreme volume (17.8K vol). First support below spot. High PCR indicates heavy hedging interest.
Secondary support: 0DTE (18.5K OI) + Monthly (20K OI). Confluence strengthens this level. Break targets 555.
Deep support: 0DTE (13.4K OI) + Weekly (3.7K OI). Final structural level before gamma flip zone. Extreme distance from spot (4.1%).
0DTE Max Pain - closest to spot (0.4% distance). MM target to minimize payouts. Strong magnetic attraction in negative GEX environment.
High 0DTE put OI (20.6K) with extreme IV (75.9% - 3x normal). Unusual hedging activity. Creates friction on upside moves toward 590.
Weekly call wall (7.5K OI) + Monthly (7.9K OI). Intermediate resistance between 590-600 zone.
